# Generated by docs-init — review and customize before use
# Generic rules: see hd-security-review/SECURITY_STANDARDS.md in your Claude skills directory (~/.claude/skills/hd-security-review/SECURITY_STANDARDS.md)

applicable_compliance:
  - NĐ 13/2023   # Vietnamese Personal Data Protection Decree
  - ISO 27001    # Recommended — user accounts + payment processing

project_rules:

  pii_fields:
    description: Fields containing personal data under NĐ 13/2023
    entities:
      User:
        - email
        - phone
        - firstName
        - lastName
        - passwordResetToken
        - emailVerificationToken
        - password              # bcrypt hash — must never appear in responses
      Address:
        - fullName
        - phone
        - street
        - city
        - district
        - ward
        - latitude     # geolocation is PII under Vietnamese law
        - longitude
      UserSession:
        - ipAddress    # IP address is PII under NĐ 13/2023
        - userAgent

  payment_data:
    description: Fields containing payment or financial data
    entities:
      Payment:
        - transactionId
        - amount
        - gatewayResponse   # JSON blob from VNPay/MoMo — treat as sensitive
        - status
        - method
      Order:
        - total
        - subtotal
        - discount
        - paymentMethod
        - paymentStatus

  payment_webhook_rules:
    vnpay:
      algorithm: HMAC-SHA512
      rule: Verify vnp_SecureHash on every VNPay return and IPN request before processing
      implementation: VNPayUtil.verifyReturnUrl / VNPayUtil.verifyIpnUrl
      skip: never
    momo:
      algorithm: HMAC-SHA256
      rule: Verify signature on every MoMo return and notify request before processing
      implementation: MomoUtil.verifySignature
      skip: never

  jwt_policy:
    rotation: Refresh token is invalidated immediately upon use (rotation pattern)
    invalidation_triggers:
      - password change
      - password reset
    storage: Refresh tokens stored in UserSession table with expiresAt tracking
    access_token_ttl: short-lived (JWT_EXPIRES_IN env var, e.g. 15m)
    refresh_token_ttl: long-lived (JWT_REFRESH_EXPIRES_IN env var, e.g. 7d)

  api_response_exposure:
    rule: Never include password, passwordResetToken, or emailVerificationToken in API responses
    rule2: Geolocation (latitude/longitude) should only be returned to the address owner
    rule3: Use ResponseUtil — never serialize TypeORM entities directly to res.json()
    rule4: gatewayResponse from Payment must never be forwarded to customer-facing API responses

  socket_auth:
    rule: All Socket.IO connections must be authenticated at handshake time
    rule2: Never add event handlers that bypass the authentication gate at connection-time

  data_minimization:
    rule: Apply NĐ 13/2023 data minimization — collect only what is needed for the stated purpose
    user_rights:
      - Right to access own data (profile, orders, addresses — endpoints exist)
      - Right to delete account (not yet implemented — known gap)
      - Right to correct inaccurate data (profile update endpoint exists)

  known_gaps:
    - Account deletion endpoint not implemented (NĐ 13/2023 right to erasure)
    - No structured audit log for admin access to payment records
    - No explicit data retention policy enforced at the database level

## Additions from base standard

  logging_and_audit:
    description: "§3.9 — Logging and audit trail requirements"
    rules:
      - Do not log PII fields (name, email, phone, card numbers, tokens)
      - Maintain audit trail for all operations that read, write, or delete PII (who, what, when)
      - Log authentication events (login success, login failure, logout, token refresh)
      - Log authorization failures (access denied events)
      - Audit logs must be tamper-evident and retained per applicable compliance framework

  transport_security:
    description: "§3.10 — Transport layer security requirements"
    rules:
      - All external-facing endpoints must use HTTPS (TLS 1.2 minimum, TLS 1.3 preferred)
      - No mixed content on HTTPS-served pages
      - Do not transmit sensitive data (tokens, PII, credentials) in URL parameters — use request body or headers
      - Implement HSTS for web applications

  critical_gate:
    description: "§4 — 6 must-pass blocking checks for security reviews"
    checks:
      1_no_unauthenticated_endpoints: "Every endpoint must declare its auth requirement; public endpoints need documented justification"
      2_no_injection_vectors: "All DB queries use parameterized statements; no string concatenation of user input"
      3_no_sensitive_fields_in_response: "password, tokens, card_number, cvv, ssn, private_key never appear in API responses"
      4_no_hardcoded_secrets: "No credentials, API keys, or crypto keys in source code or committed config"
      5_tenant_isolation: "N/A — single-tenant system"
      6_zero_compliance_violations: "No violations of NĐ 13/2023 or ISO 27001 as declared in applicable_compliance"
